summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ExpertOpinion marketplace after MongoDB ObjectId fixes. All core functionality working perfectly with 100% backend API success rate and excellent frontend integration. Full flow tested: Client posts issue -> Expert sends offer -> Client accepts -> Payment -> Chat.

working_endpoints: /api/auth/login - All user types (client, expert, admin) - 100% success

working_features: Issue creation form with category/city selection working perfectly
Expert dashboard with Browse Issues, My Offers, My Bookings tabs
Client dashboard with issue management and booking tracking
Offer creation and acceptance flow working end-to-end
Real-time chat functionality with message sending/receiving
Profile updates working (name changes reflected immediately)
Issue filtering and browsing for experts
Booking status tracking (pending payment -> confirmed -> in progress)
Authentication flow for all user types

passed_tests: Client issue creation with form validation
Expert offer submission with time slots and pricing
Client offer acceptance and booking creation
Expert dashboard with issue browsing and filters
Issue status tracking (open -> in progress -> confirmed)
Cross-user flow testing (client -> expert -> client interactions)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor admin UI elements not fully tested)
